codeReview.summary: The fix correctly addresses the original failure by restructuring the test to create 25 claims for the SAME user (not different students) and verifying that only 20 are returned. The implementation properly handles the database constraint that one student can only claim each listing once by creating 25 different listings.

summary: PASS - The fix successfully addresses the original failure. The test now creates 25 listings and 25 claims for the SAME user (userId), then verifies that GET /claims/mine returns exactly 20 claims due to the LIMIT 20 clause in the SQL query. The implementation correctly handles the UNIQUE(listing_id, student_id) constraint by using multiple listings instead of a single listing. The fix is complete and correct.
